text:
黒ノ領域に
珍しい石があるってウワサなのよ。
それを、集めてきてくれないかなって。

どうせ、アンタのことだから
ヒマしてるんでしょ？

ほら、ちゃちゃっと黒ノ領域へ
行ってきなさいよ。
簡単でしょ？　よろしくね！

<%me>!
Could I bug you for a sec?

I heard a rumor that there are some rare
stones in the Nightfall Province. I was
wondering if you'd grab some for me.

I mean, knowing you, you've got plenty of free
time, right?

So get on over to the Nightfall Province
already. It'll be a breeze, right? You got this!
